name: Fix My 3 Scores
description_short: Fix My 3 Scores is a credit repair company that disputes inaccuracies on credit reports to help customers rebuild poor credit and qualify for major purchases.
description_long:
Fix My 3 Scores has operated as a Credit Services Organization for over 15 years, positioning itself as a credit repair consultant service. The company's primary focus is helping consumers with damaged credit rebuild their profiles to qualify for major life purchases such as homes, refinancing, and vehicles.

The company offers credit repair services centered on identifying and disputing negative items and errors on credit reports across the three major bureaus. Their service model involves one-on-one consultation with a dedicated credit consultant (prominently featuring "Danny" across all testimonials) who creates a customized action plan and handles the dispute process on the client's behalf. They also offer financial products through SmartCredit® and provide payment plan options for their services.

Fix My 3 Scores distinguishes itself through personalized, hands-on service with direct consultant involvement rather than automated systems. The website emphasizes the relationship with individual consultants, extensive customer testimonials highlighting specific results (repo removal, credit score increases, mortgage qualification), and claims of reasonable pricing. The company positions accessibility through a toll-free phone line and appointment scheduling.

However, the profile relies entirely on testimonial evidence without disclosure of average results, specific timelines, regulatory compliance details, pricing transparency, or documented dispute success rates. The emphasis on a single consultant and lack of independent outcome data make it difficult to assess actual effectiveness or consistency across different customers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 15+ years operating history as a Credit Services Organization
Personalized service with dedicated credit consultant who handles disputes on client's behalf
Multiple customer testimonials reporting specific results (repo removal, qualification for home/car purchases)
Free e-Book resource (7 steps to better credit) available to interested consumers
Accessible by phone with same-day appointment scheduling capability
Payment plan options offered to make services more affordable
Customers report clear communication and regular follow-up from consultant
cons: No pricing information disclosed on website, making cost comparison impossible
No disclosure of average credit score improvements, success rates, or typical timelines
All positive testimonials appear from 2017-2023 with no recent updates or independent verification
No information about regulatory licensing, FCRA compliance procedures, or dispute methodology
Service heavily dependent on one named individual (Danny), raising concerns about consistency and scalability
best_for: Consumers with significant credit damage (repos, collections, charge-offs) who need major purchases (homes, vehicles)
People preferring hands-on, personalized service over automated credit repair platforms
Spanish-speaking consumers (testimonials in Spanish, bilingual service indicated)
diagnosis: Fix My 3 Scores is best for consumers with damaged credit seeking personalized dispute assistance to qualify for major purchases, particularly those who prefer working with a dedicated consultant. The main caveat is the complete absence of pricing transparency, documented success metrics, or independent verification of results—customers must call for estimates and rely solely on testimonials rather than objective outcome data.
services: Credit report dispute filing and management
Removal of negative items (repos, collections, charge-offs)
SmartCredit® financial products (specific offerings not detailed)
Customized action plans and credit strategy
Payment plan options for service fees
Free e-Book on credit improvement steps
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4199 Flat Rock Rd bldg 100, Riverside, CA 92505
